//: The tspc lowering-emit stage of the publish build (scripts/build-package.ts `tspcProject`): the @rhombus-std/primitives.transformer plugin rewrites each `nameof<T>()` call to its derived token string (and elides the consumed import) while emitting per-file JS into .tspc-out/, which `bun build` then bundles into dist/. `Bun.build` alone never runs ts-patch transformers -- this stage is what gets `nameof` lowered into the shipped JS. Typecheck/lint stay on plain tsc: `nameof` typechecks as an ordinary string-returning function.
